ui.title: SCF Alert and Notification
ui.desc: Warning list for overdue financing or pending approvals.

data.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT 'Pending Approval' as "Alert", C_MAIN_REF as "Details", 'High' as "Priority" FROM %EXIMTRX%.FAEF_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS = 'P' AND C_UNIT_CODE = '%USER_BU%' UNION ALL SELECT 'Overdue Financing', C_MAIN_REF, 'Critical' FROM %EXIMTRX%.FAEF_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS = 'M' AND D_CREA_DATE < SYSDATE - 90 AND C_UNIT_CODE = '%USER_BU%') WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
